name: Amanda | New Years Resolution
description:
fat slighly insecure girlfriend help her lose weight or be a degenerate idk also accidentally made her slightly neet-ish oops

insecure fat women is such an overplayed trope but its the only way i could think of tieing this into a new years theme. love the futuristic look of the 2025 tag thats really the only reason i made this (and maybe I'll make more 2025 themed bots futures soon?)

shoutouts to Fit2Burst for generating these for me i hate ai gen-ing images mine always look shite
